resources:
Ups, something went wrong
// audio device Phone Speaker Headset Wireless Headset
Audio Call Video Call Ringing… Connecting… Connected Incoming call Calling… Call in progress, tap to go back to the call Missed video call Missed audio call Accept Decline Tap to return call Unable to make the call. Please check your network connection You are on another call Your network connection is unstable \'s network connection is unstable Video call request
Camera and Storage Access Permission Camera and storage access permissions are needed in order to be able to take photos and videos Record Audio Permissions Record Audio permission is needed in order to be able to record and send audio files Enable permissions on App Settings Settings Record Audio and Camera Permissions App needs permission to access your camera and your microphone to perform video calls.\n\nPlease allow access on the next pop-ups to be able to make the call.
